evals.prompt: Configure Prisma em um backend NestJS dentro de monorepo Bun.
evals.expected_output: A skill não assume npm/npx; scripts Prisma usam binários locais e install respeita Bun.
assertions: Generated package scripts use 'prisma generate' (not 'npx prisma generate')
prisma.config.ts seed uses 'bunx tsx prisma/seed/main.ts' for Bun projects
Install flow detects packageManager bun from package.json

evals.prompt: Reaplique config-prisma em backend já configurado com Docker Compose e seed moderno.
evals.expected_output: A aplicação é idempotente, preserva seed moderno, mantém docker-compose e não recria seeds de módulos.
assertions: No module seed task is created by default
DATABASE_URL is upserted without deleting unrelated env vars

evals.prompt: Configure Prisma em monorepo pnpm com backend NestJS existente sem migrations.
evals.expected_output: A skill detecta pnpm, usa 'pnpm exec tsx' no seed do prisma.config.ts e 'pnpm install' no --install.
assertions: prisma.config.ts seed uses 'pnpm exec tsx prisma/seed/main.ts' for pnpm projects
bootstrap.model.prisma is created when no domain models exist
DbModule is added to app.module.ts imports
